description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM_GPU-CUDA/GenAI Release Build that automates building and publishing FBGEMM_GPU-CUDA release builds against PyTorch-CUDA Release to public PyPI. The workflow triggers on pull requests and push events to specific release branches, and also allows for manual triggering with customizable inputs for PyTorch channel, CUDA version, and PyPI publishing. The workflow consists of multiple jobs for generating build and test matrices, building, testing, and publishing to PyPI.
